name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream8-container reproduce

look for bad syslog entries

Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream8-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 01 19:20:22 bad34ba02e63 rc[650038]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
